audit_categories.observation: The concept appears to depend on personal or workflow data, so trust language and data-minimisation choices will materially affect adoption.
audit_categories.recommended_validation_question: Which minimum data fields are truly necessary for the first useful experience?

skeptic_review.summary: Skeptic review focuses on weak proof, habit-change friction, and value capture gaps.
challenged_assumptions: The solution story may still be too abstract or too workflow-dependent.
Founder messaging still relies on implied value rather than observable outcomes.
